_meta.codeowners: CODEOWNERS (2 approvals required for critical paths as of 2026-05)
_meta.note: This is the Scalekit-specific escalation trigger map. External consumers: copy _template-escalation-triggers.json to <your-docs-repo>/.devex-kit/escalation-triggers.json.

severity_levels.low: No escalation. Standard PR review. Merge after one approval.
severity_levels.medium: Mention the change in the PR description. One reviewer is sufficient but should be aware of the impact.
severity_levels.high: Tag a maintainer. Explain the journey impact in the PR description. Do not merge without maintainer sign-off.
severity_levels.critical: Requires 2 CODEOWNER approvals (enforced by branch protection). Do not merge without it. Explain the full impact.

triggers.reason: New cookbook recipes are standalone and do not affect navigation or other pages.
Copy changes, frontmatter fixes, and content edits to existing pages.
New pages require a sidebar entry and may affect journey ordering. Flag in PR description.
triggers.pr_note: Include: which product journey this page belongs to, where in the sidebar it should appear, and whether it replaces or extends existing content.

triggers.reason: Sidebar changes affect navigation for all readers. Group label renames and reorderings change the perceived developer journey.
triggers.pr_note: Include: which groups or items changed, the before/after label or order, and whether any redirect is needed for changed URL patterns.

triggers.reason: New top-level topics change the primary navigation structure and secondary nav wiring.
triggers.pr_note: Include: the new topic ID, the URL prefix, the secondary nav entry, and a description of the new product area's place in the overall journey.

triggers.reason: Secondary nav changes affect the top-level tab bar visible on every page.
Redirect rules affect SEO and external links. Missing redirects break bookmarks and search rankings.
triggers.pr_note: Include: old path, new path, and whether the old path was externally published (in changelogs, social posts, partner docs).

triggers.reason: Overrides control the visual shell (Head, Header, Footer, PageSidebar, PageTitle, MarkdownContent, Banner) — changes affect every page.
Plugin changes affect build behavior, link validation, and deployed features site-wide.
Setup templates are hand-authored and merged without escalation. Run pnpm run sync-agent-connectors after editing.
Usage templates are hand-authored and merged without escalation. Run pnpm run sync-agent-connectors after editing.
These are generated files. Direct edits are a signal that the sync workflow was bypassed and will be overwritten.
triggers.pr_note: Do not edit generated connector pages directly. See agent-connector-flow.md for the correct workflow.

triggers.reason: LLM config affects the llms.txt feed consumed by AI assistants and developer tools.
